subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! Praise be to the Lord of all worlds, Who hath graciously aided thee to recognize that which is in all the Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حسن حمد پروردگار عالمیان را که تو را تایید فرمود بعرفان آنچه در جمیع کتب
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @justice and wrath of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @martyrs and martyrdom
